CRASH_FAIL_CARGO: You failed to recover the cargo.
CRASH_HINT_STINGER: Hold ^3[{+usereload}]^7 to Pick Up the Stinger M7
CRASH_HINT_STINGER_KEYBOARD: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Pick Up the Stinger M7
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ACP_HEATSIGNATURES: ^2VTOL Pilot: ^7Gideon, we've got multiple heat signatures. Are you sure you're alone down there?
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ACP_YOURELUCKY: ^2VTOL Pilot: ^7Roger that, Gideon. You're lucky; we were just about to leave without you.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_AS1_BREAKINGUP3: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7Say again, 1-2, you're breaking up. Copy that.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_AS1_PREPARETOMOVE: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7Solid copy, we'll prepare to move in 5.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_AS1_STILLSECURE: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7Affirmative, we're still secure. Ammo count green.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_AS1_UNDERATTACK: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7Command, we're under attack! Send reinforcements! Hostile forces engaged!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_AS2_SENDINGBACKUP: ^2Atlas Soldier #2: ^7Sending backup to your position. Repeat, backup is on its way.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_AS2_TUNNEL: ^2Atlas Soldier #2: ^7There's a tunnel 60 meters south west.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_AS3_COLDASHELL: ^2Atlas Soldier #3: ^7It's cold as hell down here, sir. No one's going to survive long on their own.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_AS3_CONTINUESEARCH: ^2Atlas Soldier #3: ^7We'll continue our search from map grid 0-6-5-3-7-2. Update last known position every 20. How copy?
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_AS3_FANOUT: ^2Atlas Soldier #3: ^7Fan out. Report back every 5 minutes.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_AS3_FLANKINGOPTIONS: ^2Atlas Soldier #3: ^7Give me all flanking options, then radio in your pos data.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_AS3_LOSINGSIGNAL1: ^2Atlas Soldier #3: ^7Negative, we're losing the signal...  damn it.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_AS3_NOSIGNAL: ^2Atlas Soldier #3: ^7No, sir, there's been no sign of the missing Sentinel Operatives.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_AS3_OTHERSQUADS: ^2Atlas Soldier #3: ^7The other squads have not reported in. Our signal strength is getting worse the deeper we go
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_AS3_SECUREPERIMETER: ^2Atlas Soldier #3: ^7Spread out and secure the perimeter.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_AS3_SITESECURE: ^2Atlas Soldier #3: ^7Command, the site is secure. 1 wounded. 1 dead.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRK_IFHEWANTEDTOKILL: ^2Cormack: ^7If he wanted to kill us, we'd already be dead.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_ACTIVATED: ^2Cormack: ^7Once it's activated, we'll have 10 seconds to get clear.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_BIRDDOWN: ^2Cormack: ^7Alright Mitchell, time to bring this bird down.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_CARGOAHEAD: ^2Cormack: ^7The cargo is up ahead; keep moving!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_CARGOINTOW: ^2Cormack: ^7Kingpin, chutes deployed. Cargo in tow. Heading to the drop point.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_CLEANUPREST: ^2Cormack: ^7Let's clean up the rest, then follow the others.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_CLEARBLAST: ^2Cormack: ^710 seconds! Let's get clear of the blast!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_COMEIN3: ^2Cormack: ^7Kingpin, come in. This is Sentinel 2-3. We are still en route to the cargo. Come in.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_COMPANYHERE: ^2Cormack: ^7We might have company down here. Nice and slow...
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_CRASHSITE: ^2Cormack: ^7Affirmative, Kingpin. We will rendezvous with Guardian 5 at the drop point and secure the cargo. Sentinel 2-3 out.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_DONTTRUSTYOU: ^2Cormack: ^7We picked up a guest along the way. Bringing him in for debriefing. Cormack out.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_DRAWFIRE: ^2Cormack: ^7Take cover and draw fire from Guardian 5.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_DRAWTHEMOUT: ^2Cormack: ^7I'm moving down to draw them out. Pick off the stragglers, Ilona.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_DRONEGUIDANCE: ^2Ilona: ^7We have your signal, Sentinel 2-3. Drone guidance is on target for the drop point.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_EVACSHERE: ^2Cormack: ^7Evac's here. We're moving to your position!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_FULLYCOMP4: ^2Cormack: ^7Kingpin, this is Sentinel 2-3. We have been fully compromised!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_GETCARGO: ^2Cormack: ^7Alright, Mitchell, let's go get this cargo.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_GETDOWNHERE: ^2Cormack: ^7Get down here! We need to push through!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_GETTHECARGO: ^2Cormack: ^7Tangos are trying to get the cargo. Ilona, Mitchell, stop them!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_GETTOCARGO: ^2Cormack: ^7We have to get to the cargo!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_GRUNT1: ^2Cormack: ^7Pain grunt from tumbling down ice chute #2
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_GRUNT2: ^2Cormack: ^7Pain grunt from tumbling down ice chute #2
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_GRUNT3: ^2Cormack: ^7Landing. Large pain grunt. Wind knocked out.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_HOLDTIGHT: ^2Cormack: ^7Guardian 5 we got the cargo. Hold tight.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_HOOKINGUPCARGO: ^2Cormack: ^7They're hooking up the cargo! We need to move now!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_ILLTAKELEAD: ^2Cormack: ^7I'll take lead. Mitchell, behind me. Ilona, cover our 6.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_INPOSITION: ^2Cormack: ^7Open fire when we're in position, Ilona.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_INTERCEPT: ^2Cormack: ^7Kingpin, this is Sentinel 2-3.Guardian 5 is down and Atlas has the cargo. Moving to intercept.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_KEEPEYE: ^2Cormack: ^7Keep an eye on your temperature gauge.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_LOADASAP: ^2Cormack: ^7Sentinel 2, load the cargo onto Guardian 5 ASAP!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_LOCATEDBOX: ^2Cormack: ^7Kingpin, this is Sentinel 2-3. Guardian 5 still has the cargo and we are closing on their location. Do you copy?
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_MOREMEN: ^2Cormack: ^7We need more men on the left flank!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_NEEDTOGETTHATCA: ^2Cormack: ^7Let's go! We need to get that cargo.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_NOCHOICE: ^2Cormack: ^7Doesn't look like we have a choice.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_ONHORIZON: ^2Cormack: ^7Titan tank on the horizon, watch out!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_QUICKTRIGGER: ^2Cormack: ^7Quick trigger, Mitchell. Wait for orders next time.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_READYTORECEIVED: ^2Kingpin: ^7Copy that, Sentinel 1. Guardian 5 is on the ground, ready to receive.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_SAYAGAIN: ^2Cormack: ^7Say again, Kingpin. Can you send exfil?
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_SEELIGHT: ^2Cormack: ^7I can see light ahead. We're gonna need to go under.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_SUITTHERMALS: ^2Cormack: ^7Suit thermals are having a hard time keeping up.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_SWARMINGUS: ^2Cormack: ^7Kingpin, we've got Atlas swarming us. We need assistance!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_TITANAHEAD: ^2Cormack: ^7Watch out! They've got a Titan dead ahead!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_TOHEADTO: ^2Cormack: ^7Guardian 5, this is Sentinel 2-3. We are attempting to head to your position. Hang in there.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_TOODEEP2: ^2Cormack: ^7Damn it. We're too deep. We need to find a way to the cargo.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_TWOONTOP: ^2Cormack: ^7Ilona, you've got bottom right. I'll take left. Mitchell, take the two on the top.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_WATCHWINDS: ^2Cormack: ^7Watch the winds, use your mag grips to steady yourself.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_WAYBACK3: ^2Cormack: ^7We need a way back to the surface.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_WEARENOW: ^2Cormack: ^7Keep moving. They know where we are now.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_CRMK_YOURASS: ^2Cormack: ^7Negative, Guardian 5!  Keep your ass on the ground. We'll load the cargo.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GDN_ANDWEALLWOULDBE: ^2Gideon: ^7And we'd all be none the wiser. There were just too many questions. I needed to find some answers for myself.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GDN_IRONSHASBETRAYED: ^2Gideon: ^7Irons has betrayed everything I stood for. I want him in the ground the same as you. If you want to stop him, we need to get to that cargo. Now.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GDN_IRONSISPLANNINGA: ^2Gideon: ^7Irons is planning a pre-emptive strike against the United States. He's been secretly developing a WMD. A bio weapon.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GDN_THISISATLASZEROO: ^2Gideon: ^7This is Atlas Zero One. Juarez and Michaels are KIA.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GID_COMINGAPART3: ^2Gideon: ^7Hurry! This whole place is coming apart!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GID_DEALTHWITH: ^2Gideon: ^7Atlas 2-1, I'm ready for pickup. Sentinel operatives have been dealt with.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GID_GETLOW: ^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell, pick up the stinger and get low.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GID_GRABCARGO2: ^2Gideon: ^7I'll buy you some time. Grab the cargo!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GID_HOLDFIRE2: ^2Gideon: ^7Get a target lock but hold your fire until my signal.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GID_IMMEDIATEEXFIL: ^2Gideon: ^7This is Atlas One, need immediate exfil on my coordinates.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GID_LETSMOVE1: ^2Gideon: ^7Let's move. We only have one shot at this.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GID_NOTUNDERSTAND1: ^2Gideon: ^7Dammit, Mitchell! What part of 'hold your fire' did you not understand?
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GID_STAYLOW: ^2Gideon: ^7Everyone on me. Ilona stay low and call for exfil. Be ready if things go south.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GID_STINGERS: ^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell, Cormack, grab those stingers and get out of sight.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GRDN5_LIFTINGOFF: ^2Guardian 5: ^7I can't stay here any longer! Lifting off!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GRDN5_LOSTREAD: ^2Guardian 5: ^7Kingpin, this is Guardian 5! We've lost rear stabilizers!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GRDN5_STATIC4: ^2Guardian 5: ^7To any Sentinel forces who are receiving this transmission. This is Guardian 5. We have 2 wounded and 1 dead. We require immediate exfil.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_GRDN5_WHERETHEHELL: ^2Guardian 5: ^7Sentinel 2-3, where the hell are you? We are under fire! Multiple KIAs. Requesting immediate hot exfil! Command has failed to respond!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_BLEWHATCH: ^2Ilona: ^7Sentinel 2 blew the back hatch and is securing the cargo.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_EXITAHEAD: ^2Ilona: ^7I see an exit ahead, keep moving!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_FOLLOWWATER: ^2Ilona: ^7We can try and follow the water through here.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_FROMSURFACE: ^2Ilona: ^7That's coming from the surface. Must be more drop pods.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_GRUNT1: ^2Ilona: ^7Pain grunt from tumbling down ice chute #2
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_GRUNT2: ^2Ilona: ^7Pain grunt from tumbling down ice chute #2
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_GRUNT3: ^2Ilona: ^7Landing. Large pain grunt. Wind knocked out.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_MOREOFTHEM: ^2Ilona: ^7Mitchell, more of them near the cargo!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_NOISE: ^2Cormack: ^7Lots of noise up ahead. This way, keep it slow.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_OPENINGHERE2: ^2Ilona: ^7Looks to be an opening through here...
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_SECURECARGO2: ^2Ilona: ^7We've got to secure that cargo! Keep pushing forward!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_SECURINGCARGO: ^2Ilona: ^7The extraction team blew the back hatch and is securing the cargo.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_STAYUPHERE: ^2Ilona: ^7I'll stay up here and provide covering fire.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_SWIMDOWN: ^2Ilona: ^7Mitchell, swim down with Cormack. I'm right behind you.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_THATSMOKE: ^2Ilona: ^7That smoke. It has to be the chopper.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_THERMALS: ^2Ilona: ^7Thermals can't keep up in this water.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_VTOLTAKEOFF: ^2Ilona: ^7The VTOL is going to take off! Push up, push up!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_ILN_WHYNOWGIDEON: ^2Ilona: ^7Why now, Gideon? You could've escaped from New Baghdad with us.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_KP_AIRSUPPORT: ^2Kingpin: ^7Air support is engaged with enemy fighters.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_KP_ISSTILLON: ^2Kingpin: ^7Assets incoming, Sentinel 2-3. Mission is still on - you must retrieve that cargo.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_KP_ORBITAL: ^2Kingpin: ^7We're tracking their orbital platform. No movement yet.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_KP_PODSINBOUND: ^2Kingpin: ^7All units be advised, we've picked up an Atlas QRF on approach. Drop pods are inbound on your position.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_KP_SENDINGEXFIL: ^2Kingpin: ^7Solid copy. Sending exfil to your position.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_SO_PRIMEOBJ: ^2Kingpin: ^7Copy all, Sentinel 2-3. Your primary objective is the cargo. All other assets are expendable.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_SO_SOLIDCOPY1: ^2Kingpin: ^7Solid copy, Sentinel 2-3. Nice work out there.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_SS1_MANDOWN: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7Man down, man down. We're not going to make it to Guardian 5.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_SS1_MNORTHRIDGE: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7More drop pods coming in on the northern ridge!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_SS1_SECURECARGO: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7Sentinel 2 moving to secure the cargo.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_SS1_SOUTHRIDGE: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7More drop pods coming in on the southern ridge!
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_SS3_HOSTILESNORTH: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7We've got hostiles moving in from the north.
SUBTITLE_CRASH_CRSH_SS3_HOSTILESSOUTH: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7We've got hostiles moving in from the south.
